The canonical repository instructions are in `AGENTS.md` and `.agents/`.

Before editing textbook content or platform code:

1. Read `AGENTS.md`.
2. Read `.agents/README.md`.
3. Apply the relevant skill under `.agents/skills/`.

Do not treat `.agents/archive/` as active instructions.

The Google Drive `.agents` folder may be a filesystem junction to the canonical
repository `.agents` directory. If verified as a junction, either path edits the
same files. If not a junction, redirect:

`G:\My Drive\0-Projects\!-important\BITM330-book-drive\.agents`

to:

`C:\Users\nd115232\Documents\GitHub\dima-publishing\.agents`

Edit only the repository copy.
